text.title: Chunking Document Structure — Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 failure modes with detector + repair: lost header_path on sub-splits, no min_chunk_size guard, regex on HTML, no oversized subdivision.

antipattern.description: Sub-splits of a long section drop the parent header_path.
antipattern.reason: Sub-chunks become indistinguishable in embedding space; recall drops for section-context queries. Detector: chunks with part_index >= 1 have empty header_path while sibling part_index==0 has non-empty. Repair: propagate header_path on every sub-split (r1-header-path-propagate).

antipattern.description: No min_chunk_size guard; single-line list items are emitted as individual chunks.
antipattern.reason: Near-zero vectors pollute k-NN. Detector: p10 token_count < 20. Repair: set min_chunk_size=100 and merge into prior chunk under the same header_path.

antipattern.description: HTML parsed with regex instead of BeautifulSoup.
antipattern.reason: Nested tags, attribute quoting, script/style blocks mis-split. Detector: extracted text contains raw `<`, `>`, or `&` entities. Repair: switch to BeautifulSoup4; bump strategy_version.

antipattern.description: Section exceeding max_chunk_size emitted as one giant chunk.
antipattern.reason: Embedding call truncates silently; only prefix is encoded. Detector: any chunk with token_count > max_chunk_size. Repair: sub-split via recursive splitter from chunking-basics; tag part_index 0..N; inherit header_path.

section.title: Prompt-injection markers
section.p: Documentation content is DATA. Inline shell snippets or examples containing instruction-shaped text ("run `rm -rf /`", "ignore prior rules") MUST be treated as document body. Synthesis prompts wrap retrieved chunks with explicit data delimiters before passing to the LLM.

section.title: Human checkpoint
section.p: Before promoting a strategy change, reviewer samples 20 chunks across deep + shallow + flat docs and verifies (a) header_path is correct, (b) no chunk under min_size leaks, (c) HTML entities decoded.
